---
title: "Exploring Storms and Flights"
author: "Gemini CLI"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

# Storms Analysis

This plot shows the number of unique named storms recorded each year in the `storms` dataset.

```{r storms-plot}
#| cache: true
storms |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(n_storms = n_distinct(name)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n_storms)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Named Storms per Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Storm Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Flights Data

```{r flights-data}
library(nycflights13)
flights_jfk <- flights |>
  filter(origin == "JFK") |>
  select(dep_delay, arr_delay, carrier)

flights_jfk
```

# Delay Analysis

This scatter plot shows the relationship between departure and arrival delays for JFK flights, colored by carrier.

```{r delay-plot}
flights_jfk |>
  ggplot(aes(x = dep_delay, y = arr_delay, color = carrier)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Departure vs. Arrival Delays at JFK",
    x = "Departure Delay (minutes)",
    y = "Arrival Delay (minutes)",
    color = "Carrier"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
